entry.title: Re: SD - Incompletion procedure trigger before entering m...
entry.content: Why not to set this as mandatory in customer master ?  It will be a standard functionality rather looking at sale order level where you need to go for customs validation.

entry.title: Re: Default BOL form for US?
entry.content:
Hi @nonsensely 

Please see the link for delivery output type just an example to print in ERP level (IM).

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/c7894a248ca14f74aca67f97528e5ad7/f01abf53d25ab64ce10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US

In my opinion- Always good to have BOL at ERP delivery level (ERP Outbound Delivery is must document even though you opt for SCM Module) and should have option to print from SCM module as well (optional)...you would not find default here so you need to develop the solution as new output type even though you do not use SCM module(TM/EWM)...

Default would be output type CMR1 in in LE-Transportation.

Please let us know if you have further questions.

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.content: Looking forward to this session!

entry.title: Re: How to fill the search field using semantic navigatio...

entry.title: Re: SD - Incompletion procedure trigger before entering m...
entry.content: I tried that but payment method is not fetched from customer master , is that standard behaviour ?

entry.title: Re: Create Dynamic Table for SQL String
entry.content:
I didnt really have one, given i was at a bit of loss, on how to proceed, but it worked with the RTTS part, but I found a blog, that I will leave here if others are interested. Thank you the point in the right direction 🙂

If i could trouble with a more precise question, is there a way to do it in a more refined way than giving it the tables like the blog did e.g:
lo_struct ?= cl_abap_typedescr=>describe_by_name( 'AGR_USERS' ).
  lt_comp  = lo_struct->get_components( ).
  APPEND LINES OF lt_comp TO lt_tot_comp.
  lo_struct ?= cl_abap_typedescr=>describe_by_name( 'E070' ).
  lt_comp  = lo_struct->get_components( ).
  APPEND LINES OF lt_comp TO lt_tot_comp.

 



as that adds quite alot of unused fields, can one dynamicly give it fields from existing tables? Hopefully give it the fields from the select statement?

 

https://zevolving.com/2008/09/dynamic-internal-table-creation/

entry.title: An error occurred while retrieving tokens and URL (Statutory reports)
entry.content:
When downloading a document in the Statutory reports app, we get the message "An error occurred while retrieving tokens and URL". 

There's a note describing exactly the same problem (3164880 - DRC - Run Statutory Reports (F1515) - An error occurred while retrieving tokens and URL | SAP Knowledge Base Article)

After going through the note we're a bit uncertain if the app can handle DMS on BTP at all or if it requires content server ("the old way") ? We use DMS on BTP and we're on prem 2023. Please let me know if you have an idea... 🙂

Best regards,
Line C.

entry.title: Re: Optimizing field column widths in a Fiori Elements List Application
entry.content:
Is this a cloud application? Some annotations seem to be framework-specific. 

https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_cp_index_htm/CLOUD/en-US/abencds_943223464-_anno.htm

I'm not quite sure what that means. But I doubt you can control column-widths effectively using annotations, it's so dependent on the device, browser, framework...

But it is a good question.

I changed the bot to "Unattended" and test but same result

Trigger the API from POSTMAN, and in monitioring status is running and logs also showing that my automation is started but nothing is happening.

entry.title: workitem after resubmission again in inbox
entry.content:
Hello,

we have several sap systems and clients. In one client a workitem gets back automatically in the inbox, in another client it stays in resubmission. Where or how can this behavior be changed?

entry.title: Re: How to use Performance Ratings in Compensation Eligibility Rules
entry.content:
Hello, 

Thank you @xavierlegarrec , this is a very helpful workaround!

I am trying to implement it for one of my client and I encounter an issue. My client has several performance forms showing in the Trend_OverallPotential from which I am trying to get the rating to an MDF. I understand that the latest one is the one that is taken into account by the IC job. 

I would like to be sure what performance form it is actually taking so I tryied to map the field "source" of the Trend to the MDF but it does not display the name of the form, only "Performance" or "Live Profile" which is not very helpful. 

We also thought about having a canvas report and schedule an import to the MDF in order to be able to filter the date on the right performance form. This was not successfull either because we are not able to change the column header to match the one required by the MDF. 

I am stuck there right now. 

Is any of you ever got the same issue (multiple performance forms) ? Do you have any solution you can thing about? 

Any help/insights will be much appreciated!

Thanks

entry.title: Utility supplier reaches milestone with SAP S/4HANA Utilities
entry.content:
CELESC - one of the leading and most innovative energy suppliers in Brazil - decided to transition their entire ERP and customer relationship system to the new SAP S/4HANA Utilities platform. The aim of this transition is to provide CELESC customers an even better online service by making their company processes more robust and future proof. More than 3.900 Celesc employees fulfill its public function of providing energy for development and quality of life, and so serve more than 3.3 million Brazilians with energy every day. Being on a fast-growing market (anticipated more than 7% per year until 2029) it was crucial for Celesc to choose newest technology, that enables excellent customer experience with robust growth capabilities for the company.

In line with its vision to be an efficient energy company, recognized for its level of quality and value generation, CELESC finalized the whole transition process of their legacy commercial solution within the last months. This incorporates not only the SAP Enterprise Management solution for Utilities, but also the innovative SAP S/4HANA Utilities extensions for meter-to-cash processes by PROLOGA. With access to the latest updates and enhancements from SAP and PROLOGA, CELESC is now able to further increase flexibility, have the highest security standards and access to cutting-edge technologies. All of this empowers the company to further innovate and provide its customers a best-in-class user experience.

“CELESC and SAP together with PROLOGA have been collaborating for many years now, becoming partners on our mission to strive for excellence.” said Mr. Leandro Dal Pizzol, CIO.  “This strategically important partnership helps CELESC to ensure future market success. With SAP S/4HANA Utilities and the Utilities extension for meter-to-cash processes by PROLOGA, we have a powerful tool to be an even stronger partner for our customers using state-of-the-art business processes based on future-oriented technologies.”

PROLOGA is an internationally operating IT company with decades of experience in the development, implementation and operation of software solutions for companies in the utilities and environmental service sectors. As a certified development and cooperation partner of SAP SE, PROLOGA aims to give its international customers the decisive edge in a constantly changing environment through flexibly adaptable software products.

Leveraging the keyword „digital transformation”, CELESC can now offer to its more than 3 million customers an even closer relationship. Using a mobile app, customers can review detailed contract information as well as monitor contract changes online. “We are now working with one of the most modern service-management platforms worldwide.”

 A very important building block in this system is the first integration of SAP S/4HANA Utilities extensions for meter-to-cash processes by PROLOGA. This solution is deeply embedded into the SAP S/4HANA Utilities customer relationship and billing system, allowing CELESC employees to read their customers meters and handing out the bill in seconds, even in offline scenarios. This saves CELESC a tremendous amount of bureaucracy, accelerates the billing process and increases end-customer satisfaction.

Another changeover benefit is the digitally and error-free transfer of meter-reading and billing information into CELESC’s customer management system without any additional effort. By that, CELESC employees can recognize changes more quickly (e.g. additional consumption) and initiate necessary steps sooner (e.g. adjusted offerings for the customer). Also, the customers will now receive the bills in more detail and so understand their energy and tax contributions at a glance.

This immediate data synchronization furthermore enables a live status monitoring for the dispatchers. Within the FIORI-App dispatchers can view each meter reader tour individually and quickly realize possible challenges from unexpected situations like traffic jams, that delay the reading process. In such cases, dispatchers can re-assign reading tasks to other meter reading team members and so ensure, customers still receive their bill in time. This shared workload ensures a significant reduction of unread meters, leading finally to a better in-time cash flow for the company.

 

Figure 1: Fiori App showing status of assigned tours, from here a dispatcher can adjust assignments in a few seconds

Thanks to the support of SAP Consulting Brazil the whole transition process went like a breeze and was finished as planned at the beginning of May 2024. With the entire system being live now for several months, CELESC is fully satisfied with their new digital meter reading and billing process.

Challenges:

Complex system landscape preventing excellent customer experience

Delays in resolving customer queries

Lack of standardization and automation

SAP Solutions:

SAP S/4HANA Utilities

SAP S/4HANA Utilities for customer engagement, enterprise edition

SAP S/4HANA Utilities extensions for meter-to-cash processes by PROLOGA

Why SAP:

  • Integrate & Automate:
    • SAP S/4HANA Cloud combined with the SAP Utilities Core solution to integrate systems, automate processes, and unify data in line with industry best practices
  • Short ramp-Up phase
    • Workflow simplicity and usability made possible with the SAP Fiori® user experience
  • Single source of truth, with access to financial data and insights in real time

 Benefits:

15% lower TCO (Total cost of ownership) from optimized software landscape

90% faster in providing bill to customers

60% less overtime for meter readers

70% less unread meters per month due to more agile assignments

Outcomes:

Satisfied customers through excellent customer experience by new app

Increased Employee satisfaction through streamlined workflows

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Contest
entry.content: @chaiphon - please contact community@sap.com with details on what they are trying to access for support.

entry.title: Re: [SAP BYD - HELP] CSRF token validation failed
entry.content:
From SAP:

Thank you for contacting SAP Cloud Support.

This incident has reached the Support team. We have reviewed your issue and understand that you are unable to use the SubmitForApproval Action for the EmployeeTime BO and none of the actions are available for use.

Cause :The action SubmitForApproval from EmployeeTime Business Object does not support validations in ABSL if they are created outside of an Enhancement Implementation.

Resolution :
SAP has provided a standard BADI definition which can be implemented by the partners for these types of validations. The BADI name is TIM_EMP_TIME_VALIDATION_CHECK and the corresponding enhancement spot name is ES_TIM_REC_VAL_CHK_EXT. This BADI has an interface with only one method “VALIDATE” which needs to be implemented.

This interface method has importing parameter of type TIM_EMP_TIM_VAL_CHK which in turn consists of Employee Time ROOT UUID, Action Name and Recording View type code as input parameters. These parameters will be passed from the standard SAP code to the BADI implementation whenever any action will be called on the employee’s working time confirmations.

In the BADI implementation, you need to check for the Action name that is existing on the ROOT node of the TIMX_EMPLOYEE_TIME BO (if the implemented code needs to be executed for some specific actions, in this case SUBMIT_FOR_APPROVAL) and then retrieve the ROOT and ITEM node data of TIMX_EMPLOYEE_TIME business object with the help of received Root Node UUID.

After data retrieval, the conditions need to be put to validate the entered/saved time durations. If the requirement is to raise an error message only from the ESS time sheet, then the recording view type code can be checked in the retrieved ITEM data of the BO. The error message which needs to be raised can be logged into the CHANGING parameter of the interface which in turn consists of some attributes with regards to the error message like BADI implementation name, error occurred (Yes/No), message severity, error message text etc. The SAP standard code will take care of the error handling and the error message which is received from the BADI implementation will be shown onto the UI.

For this requirement, "Enhancement Implementation" from SAP Cloud Applications Studio can be used rather than SubmitForApproval Action Validation.

I hope this serves the purpose of the incident. Please feel free to reach us if there are further questions and we are happy to help you. The incident status has been set to Solution Proposed.

 

 

 

So I checked the Enhancement Options and found:

SetEmployeeTimeItemApprover

Now need to figure out how to use this.

entry.title: Deep structured entity offline capability issue in SAP MDK application
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm developing a mobile app using SAP MDK for a client POC with offline-enabled functionality. I'm using SAP CAP as backend service. However, I am encountering the following errors when accessing deep structured entities for offline capabilities:

  • "Delta download for an Offline OData client failed. AdminService.Machines.Machines is not a media entity but is used in defining request {2} which requests stream data"
  • "Failed to initialize application data service - Error- [-10340] The download failed due to an error on the server: -857 (SERVER_SYNCHRONIZATION_ERROR) ([-10225] Message: User exception: [-100036] Failed to build the Offline OData client database.)"

I am not encountering any issues with entities that do not have a deep structure.

Entity Structure:

entity Plant {
  key ID      : UUID;
      plantID : String(10);
      machine : Composition of one Machines on machine.parent = $self;
}

entity Machines {
  key ID                 : UUID;
      makerInfo          : String(200);
  key parent             : Association to Plant;
      lastService        : Date;
      inspectionComments : String(1000);
}

Hi @Jitendra_Kansal , @bill_froelich can you suggest way to resolve this issue.

 

Thank you!

Regards,

Shankar

entry.title: Re: Deep structured entity offline capability issue in SAP MDK application
entry.content: Please don't post to Questions about SAP Websites (issue with community Website, etc.) if it's a question about SAP software. Instead, ask in Technology Q&A: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/qa-p/technology-questions. Hopefully someone will fix it for you.

entry.title: Need Help with Transportation Costs & Margin Calculation in SAP BYD
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We’re facing an issue in SAP BYD with handling transportation costs. We buy and resell products with transportation services, and need to calculate profit margins separately for both. However, SAP BYD’s current process is cumbersome, requiring labor allocations that aren’t relevant to our situation.

We Need a solution that allows us to:

  1. Add transportation fees directly to customer invoices.
  2. Calculate margins for both transportation fees and product sales separately.

Your help in finding a workaround would be greatly appreciated.

Best regards,

entry.title: Can the field MRP Type ( MARC-DISMM ) be maintained as optional in the Product Master ?
entry.content:
The field MRP Type ( MARC-DISMM )  is maintained as optional in the Configuration Activity Assign Fields to Field Selection Groups ( 104026 )  but the field is still mandatory in creating a material with MRP Views ( Create Material App , Manage Product Master data )

 

Can this field be set as optional entry ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Can the field MRP Type ( MARC-DISMM ) be maintained a...
entry.content:
Not all fields in the Product Master can be customized through field selection as optional 

 

Fields such as description , base unit , MRP TYPE are hard coded as required and cannot be left blank

 

Please use value 'ND' No planning for MRP Type as a dummy value

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Contest
entry.content: @thomas_jung Thanks. My colleague has just sent email. It is to access Devtoberfest Group. If you did not log in, you can see the group. Once you logged in, it became "Access denied".

entry.title: Re: Deep structured entity offline capability issue in SAP MDK application

entry.title: Hi, Can Adapt UI be restricted at user level?
entry.content: Hi, Can Adapt UI be restricted at user level?

entry.title: Re: FM READ_TEXT is not showing the data but the SAP standard transaction ME33L does show all the da
entry.content:
• If youd didn't change the default text during creation, the displayed text will be the text of the material master data.
  • When an user change the text, this text will become adopted by the purchase document and copied with the expected keys.

In Customizing you can force adoption (e.g. Define text types for item texts)

Also browse tables T165K (header) and T165P (item) to get the copy rules (from which text to which text) so if a text is not adopted at current level, read it from previous level (material, inforecord, etc.)

VORGATDOBJECTTDIDFOLGEBSTYPKOOBJECTKOIDFIXIE
LEKPOL030 EKPOL03 
LEKPOL031 MATERIALGRUNN

Note the FIXIE = N, so text from material master data is by default not adopted by document item.

entry.content: Not in front of the system to check this.  In your case, if the Sold-To and Payer are different in sales order, then, maintain in Payer and see whether it flows to sales order

entry.title: MATMAS inbound idoc fails with "Enter an industry sector" in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
MATMAS inbound idoc fails with "Enter an industry sector" in S/4HANA Cloud but this field is not available in the classical Create Material app or Manage Product Master Data 

 

Is there a Configuration activity to maintain this or what should i maintain in the Idoc ?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: MATMAS inbound idoc fails with "Enter an industry sec...
entry.content:
The customizing 'Define Industry Sectors and Industry-Sector-Specific Field Selection' is not available in S/4HANA Cloud as a configuration activity 

The default Industry Sectors is 'M' Mechanical engineering

In the inbound Idoc , please maintain M for MBRSH in E1MARAM

entry.title: Re: Deploy SAPUI5 app to S4HANA cloud system
entry.content: when you add deployment configuration(npm run deploy-config), you will get it.

All the best,

Xavier

entry.title: Migrating SAP office e-Mails from SAP CRM to S/4HANA
entry.content:
We plan to shut down our SAP CRM system. Is there a way to migrate all e-mails  (incoming and outgoing mails one can see in transaction SCOT) from the SAP CRM system to the S/4HANA system? 

Thanks in advance for any helpful advice. 

 

PS:

I have already analyzed report RSBCS_RESTORE but it seems only to work if the source system is a copy of the target system.

With Regards,

Revathy

entry.title: Re: Document Creation (DMS)
entry.content:
Hi

Quick question pl.  Once a document is checked in can a user check it out?

entry.title: Re: I want to consult the difference between ODATA and SO...
entry.content:
This is an old post but it comes up on top of Google search when looking for "SOAP vs OData" in SAP domain. (I'm guessing because someone edited the post in 2024.)

Because of that, I'd like to add some corrections / clarifications to the answer that is currently listed as "Accepted".

1) It talks about "web services" as if it only applies to SOAP. But both SOAP and REST (which OData uses) are in general web services (see Wikipedia).

2) Both OData and SOAP rely on HTTP protocol (what doesn't these days? 🙂 ). SOAP can technically use SMTP but I've never seen an implementation like that in SAP space.

3) Historically, SOAP web services became available in SAP systems first. They were generated from the ABAP function modules and maintained in SOAMANAGER transaction. (Note that there is also SOA = Service-oriented architecture, this is not the same SOA as in SOAP, fun stuff.)

4) Even though SOAP services can still be used and developed, they went out of favor generally (not just in SAP) because REST-based OData services are less "bulky" and gained more adoption in IT outside of SAP. Also, latest ABAP programming model (ABAP RAP / ABAP Cloud) is focused on OData service development. Therefore this is usually the first (but not the only) choice for SAP integration.

Bottom line, it's not as simple as "SOAP = old = bad, OData = good" but in general, SOAP services are used much less these days.

SOAP, REST, and OData are not SAP terms. I'd encourage to read the general information about these (e.g. wiki articles linked here) to become familiar with terminology in general.

Cheers!

entry.title: Re: Error connecting to system using ADT on eclipse
entry.content: did you try opening the system with gui first?

entry.title: Re: Deep structured entity offline capability issue in SA...
entry.content:
Hi @bill_froelich ,

Please find the CAP service metadata below: 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<edmx:Edmx Version="4.0" xmlns:edmx="http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/ns/edmx">
    <edmx:Reference Uri="https://sap.github.io/odata-vocabularies/vocabularies/Common.xml">
        <edmx:Include Alias="Common" Namespace="com.sap.vocabularies.Common.v1"/>
    </edmx:Reference>
    <edmx:Reference Uri="https://oasis-tcs.github.io/odata-vocabularies/vocabularies/Org.OData.Core.V1.xml">
        <edmx:Include Alias="Core" Namespace="Org.OData.Core.V1"/>
    </edmx:Reference>
    <edmx:Reference Uri="https://sap.github.io/odata-vocabularies/vocabularies/UI.xml">
        <edmx:Include Alias="UI" Namespace="com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1"/>
    </edmx:Reference>
    <edmx:Reference Uri="https://oasis-tcs.github.io/odata-vocabularies/vocabularies/Org.OData.Validation.V1.xml">
        <edmx:Include Alias="Validation" Namespace="Org.OData.Validation.V1"/>
    </edmx:Reference>
    <edmx:DataServices>
        <Schema Namespace="AdminService" xmlns="http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/ns/edm">
            <Annotation Term="Core.Links">
                <Collection>
                    <Record>
                        <PropertyValue Property="rel" String="author"/>
                        <PropertyValue Property="href" String="https://cap.cloud.sap"/>
                    </Record>
                </Collection>
            </Annotation>
            <EntityContainer Name="EntityContainer">
                <EntitySet Name="Incidents" EntityType="AdminService.Incidents">
                    <NavigationPropertyBinding Path="urgency" Target="Urgency"/>
                    <NavigationPropertyBinding Path="status" Target="Status"/>
                </EntitySet>
                <EntitySet Name="Urgency" EntityType="AdminService.Urgency">
                    <NavigationPropertyBinding Path="texts" Target="Urgency_texts"/>
                    <NavigationPropertyBinding Path="localized" Target="Urgency_texts"/>
                </EntitySet>
                <EntitySet Name="Status" EntityType="AdminService.Status">
                    <NavigationPropertyBinding Path="texts" Target="Status_texts"/>
                    <NavigationPropertyBinding Path="localized" Target="Status_texts"/>
                </EntitySet>
                <EntitySet Name="Plant" EntityType="AdminService.Plant">
                    <NavigationPropertyBinding Path="machine" Target="Machines"/>
                </EntitySet>
                <EntitySet Name="Machines" EntityType="AdminService.Machines">
                    <NavigationPropertyBinding Path="parent" Target="Plant"/>
                </EntitySet>
                <EntitySet Name="Urgency_texts" EntityType="AdminService.Urgency_texts"/>
                <EntitySet Name="Status_texts" EntityType="AdminService.Status_texts"/>
            </EntityContainer>
            <EntityType Name="Incidents">
                <Key>
                    <PropertyRef Name="ID"/>
                </Key>
                <Property Name="ID" Type="Edm.Guid" Nullable="false"/>
                <Property Name="customer" Type="Edm.String" MaxLength="50"/>
                <Property Name="title" Type="Edm.String" MaxLength="200"/>
                <NavigationProperty Name="urgency" Type="AdminService.Urgency">
                    <ReferentialConstraint Property="urgency_code" ReferencedProperty="code"/>
                </NavigationProperty>
                <Property Name="urgency_code" Type="Edm.String" DefaultValue="M"/>
                <NavigationProperty Name="status" Type="AdminService.Status">
                    <ReferentialConstraint Property="status_code" ReferencedProperty="code"/>
                </NavigationProperty>
                <Property Name="status_code" Type="Edm.String" DefaultValue="N"/>
            </EntityType>
            <EntityType Name="Urgency">
                <Key>
                    <PropertyRef Name="code"/>
                </Key>
                <Property Name="name" Type="Edm.String" MaxLength="255"/>
                <Property Name="descr" Type="Edm.String" MaxLength="1000"/>
                <Property Name="code" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false"/>
                <NavigationProperty Name="texts" Type="Collection(AdminService.Urgency_texts)">
                    <OnDelete Action="Cascade"/>
                </NavigationProperty>
                <NavigationProperty Name="localized" Type="AdminService.Urgency_texts">
                    <ReferentialConstraint Property="code" ReferencedProperty="code"/>
                </NavigationProperty>
            </EntityType>
            <EntityType Name="Status">
                <Key>
                    <PropertyRef Name="code"/>
                </Key>
                <Property Name="name" Type="Edm.String" MaxLength="255"/>
                <Property Name="descr" Type="Edm.String" MaxLength="1000"/>
                <Property Name="code" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false"/>
                <Property Name="criticality" Type="Edm.Int32"/>
                <NavigationProperty Name="texts" Type="Collection(AdminService.Status_texts)">
                    <OnDelete Action="Cascade"/>
                </NavigationProperty>
                <NavigationProperty Name="localized" Type="AdminService.Status_texts">
                    <ReferentialConstraint Property="code" ReferencedProperty="code"/>
                </NavigationProperty>
            </EntityType>
            <EntityType Name="Plant">
                <Key>
                    <PropertyRef Name="ID"/>
                </Key>
                <Property Name="ID" Type="Edm.Guid" Nullable="false"/>
                <Property Name="plantID" Type="Edm.String" MaxLength="10"/>
                <NavigationProperty Name="machine" Type="AdminService.Machines" Partner="parent">
                    <OnDelete Action="Cascade"/>
                    <ReferentialConstraint Property="ID" ReferencedProperty="parent_ID"/>
                </NavigationProperty>
            </EntityType>
            <EntityType Name="Machines">
                <Key>
                    <PropertyRef Name="ID"/>
                    <PropertyRef Name="parent_ID"/>
                </Key>
                <Property Name="ID" Type="Edm.Guid" Nullable="false"/>
                <Property Name="makerInfo" Type="Edm.String" MaxLength="200"/>
                <NavigationProperty Name="parent" Type="AdminService.Plant" Partner="machine">
                    <ReferentialConstraint Property="parent_ID" ReferencedProperty="ID"/>
                </NavigationProperty>
                <Property Name="parent_ID" Type="Edm.Guid" Nullable="false"/>
                <Property Name="lastService" Type="Edm.Date"/>
                <Property Name="inspectionComments" Type="Edm.String" MaxLength="1000"/>
            </EntityType>
            <EntityType Name="Urgency_texts">
                <Key>
                    <PropertyRef Name="locale"/>
                    <PropertyRef Name="code"/>
                </Key>
                <Property Name="locale" Type="Edm.String" MaxLength="14" Nullable="false"/>
                <Property Name="name" Type="Edm.String" MaxLength="255"/>
                <Property Name="descr" Type="Edm.String" MaxLength="1000"/>
                <Property Name="code" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false"/>
            </EntityType>
            <EntityType Name="Status_texts">
                <Key>
                    <PropertyRef Name="locale"/>
                    <PropertyRef Name="code"/>
                </Key>
                <Property Name="locale" Type="Edm.String" MaxLength="14" Nullable="false"/>
                <Property Name="name" Type="Edm.String" MaxLength="255"/>
                <Property Name="descr" Type="Edm.String" MaxLength="1000"/>
                <Property Name="code" Type="Edm.String" Nullable="false"/>
            </EntityType>
            <Annotations Target="AdminService.Incidents/ID">
                <Annotation Term="Core.ComputedDefaultValue" Bool="true"/>
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="AdminService.Incidents/title">
                <Annotation Term="Common.Label" String="Title"/>
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="AdminService.Incidents/urgency_code">
                <Annotation Term="Common.ValueList">
                    <Record Type="Common.ValueListType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Urgency"/>
                        <PropertyValue Property="CollectionPath" String="Urgency"/>
                        <PropertyValue Property="Parameters">
                            <Collection>
                                <Record Type="Common.ValueListParameterInOut">
                                    <PropertyValue Property="LocalDataProperty" PropertyPath="urgency_code"/>
                                    <PropertyValue Property="ValueListProperty" String="code"/>
                                </Record>
                                <Record Type="Common.ValueListParameterDisplayOnly">
                                    <PropertyValue Property="ValueListProperty" String="name"/>
                                </Record>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                    </Record>
                </Annotation>
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="AdminService.Incidents/status_code">
                <Annotation Term="Common.ValueList">
                    <Record Type="Common.ValueListType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Status"/>
                        <PropertyValue Property="CollectionPath" String="Status"/>
                        <PropertyValue Property="Parameters">
                            <Collection>
                                <Record Type="Common.ValueListParameterInOut">
                                    <PropertyValue Property="LocalDataProperty" PropertyPath="status_code"/>
                                    <PropertyValue Property="ValueListProperty" String="code"/>
                                </Record>
                                <Record Type="Common.ValueListParameterDisplayOnly">
                                    <PropertyValue Property="ValueListProperty" String="name"/>
                                </Record>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                    </Record>
                </Annotation>
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="AdminService.Urgency">
                <Annotation Term="UI.Identification">
                    <Collection>
                        <Record Type="UI.DataField">
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="name"/>
                        </Record>
                    </Collection>
                </Annotation>
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="AdminService.Urgency/name">
                <Annotation Term="Common.Label" String="Name"/>
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="AdminService.Urgency/descr">
                <Annotation Term="Common.Label" String="Description"/>
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="AdminService.Urgency/code">
                <Annotation Term="Validation.AllowedValues">
                    <Collection>
                        <Record Type="Validation.AllowedValue">
                            <Annotation Term="Core.SymbolicName" String="high"/>
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" String="H"/>
                        </Record>
                        <Record Type="Validation.AllowedValue">
                            <Annotation Term="Core.SymbolicName" String="medium"/>
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" String="M"/>
                        </Record>
                        <Record Type="Validation.AllowedValue">
                            <Annotation Term="Core.SymbolicName" String="low"/>
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" String="L"/>
                        </Record>
                    </Collection>
                </Annotation>
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="AdminService.Status">
                <Annotation Term="UI.Identification">
                    <Collection>
                        <Record Type="UI.DataField">
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="name"/>
                        </Record>
                    </Collection>
                </Annotation>
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="AdminService.Status/name">
                <Annotation Term="Common.Label" String="Name"/>
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="AdminService.Status/descr">
                <Annotation Term="Common.Label" String="Description"/>
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="AdminService.Status/code">
                <Annotation Term="Validation.AllowedValues">
                    <Collection>
                        <Record Type="Validation.AllowedValue">
                            <Annotation Term="Core.SymbolicName" String="new"/>
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" String="N"/>
                        </Record>
                        <Record Type="Validation.AllowedValue">
                            <Annotation Term="Core.SymbolicName" String="assigned"/>
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" String="A"/>
                        </Record>
                        <Record Type="Validation.AllowedValue">
                            <Annotation Term="Core.SymbolicName" String="in_process"/>
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" String="I"/>
                        </Record>
                        <Record Type="Validation.AllowedValue">
                            <Annotation Term="Core.SymbolicName" String="on_hold"/>
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" String="H"/>
                        </Record>
                        <Record Type="Validation.AllowedValue">
                            <Annotation Term="Core.SymbolicName" String="resolved"/>
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" String="R"/>
                        </Record>
                        <Record Type="Validation.AllowedValue">
                            <Annotation Term="Core.SymbolicName" String="closed"/>
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" String="C"/>
                        </Record>
                    </Collection>
                </Annotation>
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="AdminService.Plant/ID">
                <Annotation Term="Core.ComputedDefaultValue" Bool="true"/>
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="AdminService.Machines/ID">
                <Annotation Term="Core.ComputedDefaultValue" Bool="true"/>
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="AdminService.Urgency_texts/locale">
                <Annotation Term="Common.Label" String="Language Code"/>
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="AdminService.Urgency_texts/name">
                <Annotation Term="Common.Label" String="Name"/>
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="AdminService.Urgency_texts/descr">
                <Annotation Term="Common.Label" String="Description"/>
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="AdminService.Urgency_texts/code">
                <Annotation Term="Validation.AllowedValues">
                    <Collection>
                        <Record Type="Validation.AllowedValue">
                            <Annotation Term="Core.SymbolicName" String="high"/>
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" String="H"/>
                        </Record>
                        <Record Type="Validation.AllowedValue">
                            <Annotation Term="Core.SymbolicName" String="medium"/>
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" String="M"/>
                        </Record>
                        <Record Type="Validation.AllowedValue">
                            <Annotation Term="Core.SymbolicName" String="low"/>
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" String="L"/>
                        </Record>
                    </Collection>
                </Annotation>
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="AdminService.Status_texts/locale">
                <Annotation Term="Common.Label" String="Language Code"/>
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="AdminService.Status_texts/name">
                <Annotation Term="Common.Label" String="Name"/>
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="AdminService.Status_texts/descr">
                <Annotation Term="Common.Label" String="Description"/>
            </Annotations>
            <Annotations Target="AdminService.Status_texts/code">
                <Annotation Term="Validation.AllowedValues">
                    <Collection>
                        <Record Type="Validation.AllowedValue">
                            <Annotation Term="Core.SymbolicName" String="new"/>
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" String="N"/>
                        </Record>
                        <Record Type="Validation.AllowedValue">
                            <Annotation Term="Core.SymbolicName" String="assigned"/>
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" String="A"/>
                        </Record>
                        <Record Type="Validation.AllowedValue">
                            <Annotation Term="Core.SymbolicName" String="in_process"/>
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" String="I"/>
                        </Record>
                        <Record Type="Validation.AllowedValue">
                            <Annotation Term="Core.SymbolicName" String="on_hold"/>
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" String="H"/>
                        </Record>
                        <Record Type="Validation.AllowedValue">
                            <Annotation Term="Core.SymbolicName" String="resolved"/>
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" String="R"/>
                        </Record>
                        <Record Type="Validation.AllowedValue">
                            <Annotation Term="Core.SymbolicName" String="closed"/>
                            <PropertyValue Property="Value" String="C"/>
                        </Record>
                    </Collection>
                </Annotation>
            </Annotations>
        </Schema>
    </edmx:DataServices>
</edmx:Edmx>
 
Thank you!
 
Regards,
Shankar

entry.title: Re: CAP Deployment - FIORI App Does not Appear under the...
entry.content:
Hi Gregorw,

I have checked the shared Documentation and executed some of the CLI commands, which was mentioned. However, all the deployment configurations for the UI along with the SAP Build Workzone launchpad module have been already added as part of the Fiori App Generator tool/templates. I have redeployed but no luck.

 

Thanks and Regards

MD Manauwar

entry.title: Re: FreeHand SQL query with input parameters
entry.content: @XaviPolo I just noticed another good point in your example: the parameter values should be in single quotes.

entry.title: Identity Directory API specification is broken
entry.content:
Hey there,

the Identity Directory API of the package SAP Cloud Identity Services is broken. When I try to use it with SAP Build Process Automation directly or also downloaded as JSON or YAML I get the following error:

Failed to fetch the artifact information: The API specification file is invalid. As the uploaded file specification format does not align with OpenAPI or CSDL specification standards.

In the browser it is working. Link: https://api.sap.com/api/IdDS_SCIM/overview

entry.title: Re: Custom Fields Type "Number" should be empty
entry.content:
Hi Katharina

When creating a field type "Decimal Number", with some decimal places and the default value [empty], there is no value.

Kr.

MJ

entry.title: Re: Datasphere to ADLS Gen2 Connectivity
entry.content:
@bheemeshRao Thanks for the detailed info on setting up connectivity between Datasphere and Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2 using a Service Principal with a Certificate. It's really helpful! I just noticed you posted as a Q&A, but it would've been better as a blog post!

Thanks,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: Custom Fields Type "Number" should be empty
entry.content:
Hi Katharina

When creating via adaptation an extension field type "Decimal Number", with some decimal places and the default value [empty], there is no value. I do this in SAP Sales Cloud - i do expect that for Marketing Cloud it works the same.

Kr.

MJ

entry.title: 2503684 - SAP S/4HANA: new design of the views in CKM3 and the impact on BW/4HANA
entry.content: What is the impact of the new design on BW/4HANA? Does BW/4HANA need to be adapted, and if so, which adaptations are possible?

entry.title: Mexican CURP number and Tax ID are maintained under National ID number section in SF EC, but the
entry.content:
Dear Friends

We have replication error for Mexico where Mexican CURP number and Tax ID are maintained under National ID information section in SF EC but when data is replicating to SAP its considering the Tax number as National ID and throwing error "(2) Gender in CURP does not coincide. Must be (W)oman, not Q; Pernr 00011111: Infotype 0002 with error""

SF field nationalID is mapped to PERID in SAP

but when we remove Tax number and try replicating, its successful, but Client wants to maintain both Tax number and CURP national ID.

 

Is there a way we can maintain both in SF and replicate successfully.

 

Please help

entry.title: Re: Deep structured entity offline capability issue in SA...
entry.content: I suspect you want to use "Composition of many Machines" instead of one since I plant would typically have zero, one or more machines.  Using of one restricts there to only being one machine ever at the plant and use of one is discouraged per the compositions CDL doc.  Please verify your use case and update accordingly.

entry.title: Re: Error connecting to system using ADT on eclipse
Re: SAP HANA Cloud - Live data connection - No data sources
entry.content:
Hello,

We have the same issue. no data source listed.  Did you get the solution ?

Thanks for your feedback.

entry.title: Re: Error connecting to system using ADT on eclipse
entry.content:
I have faced this :
Here is a check list
1) SAP Gateway service was not connected --> Was able to get hold of the problem, with that
Double-check that the SAP gateway service is running on the server. You can do this by checking the SAP Management Console or using transaction SMGW in the SAP GUI
2) Check your route configuration
3) ADT version is outdated

The reason can be many

entry.title: Re: CAP Deployment - FIORI App Does not Appear under the...
entry.content:
Hi Mio,

Thank you for the response.

PFA of the mta file. Looking forward for the solution.

 

Thanks and Regards

MD Manauwar

entry.title: Re: How to delete a service organization in public cloud...
entry.content:
Hi Kevin,

If the Service Org has been activated (i.e., deployed to the Dev tenant), you cannot delete it. However, you can control not to transport this org info to Test and Production tenants.

I have an explanation on a similar question: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/experience-with-deleting-company-codes-before-go-live/qaq-p/13803676/comment-id/4842899#M4842899.

Regards,

George

entry.title: Re: UNV is dead, long live UNX
entry.content: @laura_vega I am in the process of evaluating upgrading from SAP BO 4.2 to SAP BO 4.3 and are still using .UNV.  My question is do all SP of 4.3 support UNV or only the latest SP?

entry.title: Re: WIP Batch in Subcontracting
entry.content: Hi, does anyone have knowledge about WIP (Work In Progress) batches? If so, please provide a detailed explanation with pictures and attach any relevant documents. I need a scenario for implementations.

entry.title: Re: UNV is dead, long live UNX
entry.content: @kevinpeoples, yes, all 4.x versions support both .unv and .unx.

entry.title: Re: Configuring Installation Points (Reference Designators) in SAP S/4HANA and SAP Digital Manufactu
entry.content:
Using SAP 3D Visual Enterprise Author, maintain your .vds 3d model file metadata to match the metadata mapping previously done in Manage Work Instructions above, see an example below:

Does the end user have to create the Metadata Category...and Key Value Pairs in the 3D .VDS?  

Category = DME

Keys = COMPONENT & REF_DES

Kind Regards,

Lars Olson

entry.title: What SPs in BO 4.3 still support UNV?
entry.content: I am in the process of evaluating upgrading from BO 4.2 to 4.3 and are still using UNV.  I am trying to find out what SPs of 4.3 still support UNV.  Originally, I thought I heard or read that UNV would only be support in SP1 of 4.3 but I am still trying to confirm.

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Cloud - Live data connection - No data sources
entry.content:
HI!

After creating your connection and selecting the creation of live connection modeling. You select your system type

Then select your conexion type

 

And in Data Source there will be a display of all your objects, cubes, tables and views.

entry.title: Re: Reduce WM stock without affecting FI documents
entry.content: @saikumarkatla What is that you are confused about? What additional explanations do you need? Please ask specific questions, so I can provide detailed answers.

entry.title: Re: SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025 Early Adopter Care Program
entry.content:
Gregory,

     The link to form asks for UserID and password, not sure site this is for.  I am unable to login to register for the Early Adopter Care program, please provide alternative register link.

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#campaign/3764

Thanks Kindly,

Ajay

entry.title: WIP Batch in SAP PP
entry.content:
Hi, does anyone have knowledge about WIP (Work In Progress) batches? If so, please provide a detailed explanation with pictures and attach any relevant documents. I need a scenario for implementations

@Sap 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition: Understanding Roles And Responsibility
entry.content: @frankalbrecht - For excel version of R&R, please get in touch with your Client Delivery Manager assigned from SAP Enterprise Cloud Services.

entry.title: Re: What SPs in BO 4.3 still support UNV?
entry.content: Until the last release of BI 4.3, current SP3 does still support.

entry.title: Locating the fields "Last Changed On" and "Completed on… - Approval date" in SAP Sales CDS view.
entry.content:
To create a custom report, we need to locate 2 specific fields from the CDS view tables from Sales apps. 

The fields requested are Last Changed On and Completed on… - Approval date, both fields are available in the My Outbox app, however I can't seem to find the correct view which contains these 2 fields.




------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Locating the fields "Last Changed On" and "Completed...
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

 

One of the fields requested (Last Changed On) can be located in the I_SalesDocument CDS View, you can confirm this by accessing the SAP API Portal and searching for LastChangeDate.

 

The other field requested "Completed on… - Approval date" is more complex, this information is located in the WorkflowTask tables and you can find further details in the I_WorkflowStatusDetails CDS view, the field name is WrkflwTskCompletionUTCDateTime, both of them can be located in the API Portal link above.

 

Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Reduce WM stock without affecting FI documents
entry.content: hi, how can we reduce the stock by using 311? As 311 is used for transferring the stock from one sloc to another within the plant. therefore still stock exists in the plant.

entry.title: Re: WIP Batch in SAP PP
entry.content:
Hello @msamiullah 

Here are some links:

  • https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/34de0103497c4b80a7c7fbf6952ff971/6400b753128eb44ce10000000a174cb4.html
  • https://sapusers-pl.translate.goog/partie-wip-sledzenie-pochodzenia-w-produkcji-masowej-w-sap-erp/?_x_tr_sl=pl&_x_tr_tl=en&_x_tr_hl=en&_x_tr_pto=wapp
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/more-traceability-and-visibility-in-work-in-process-with-sap-s-4-hana/ba-p/13364608

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: S/4 Product Compliance - Label Management
entry.content:
Hello all, 

I am currently exploring the new S/4HANA Product compliance solution as a possible fit for my client's requirements. Note we are implementing S/4HANA 2023, so please keep this in mind.

Specifically, I am looking at the new Product Compliance Label management solution, and want to get a better understanding of how it works. I have gone through in much detail the resources on help.sap.com which explains the concept very well. i.e. I understand that it relies on a third party partner to design and print the labels. 

So far, after reviewing the material and resources, the process as I understand it is as follows: 

1. create compliance requirement for labels

2. design label template using external partner solution (this replaces the old classic WWI approach). send template back to S/4 product compliance

3. assign compliance requirement and the label template to a label category in the label configuration app

4. assign configured label category to the product

5. validate and request print the label (using external partner) as and when needed.

Questions 🙂 

1. I reviewed the details of the label-specific compliance requirement that needs to be created, however, it does not seem to have much information in it other than the date format. I am just a bit unclear about how to assign the phrases and regulatory graphics to the compliance requirement. Do we create our own compliance requirement with these specific phrases and graphics?

2. Is the process similar to the safety data sheet process where we perform an assessment against the assigned compliance requirements that contain phrases and labels? 

3. For my benefit, would it be possible to briefly describe the end-to-end process from design of template all the way to print from a business process point of view?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: What Business Catalog is needed to access "maintain storage categories" 103583 in CBC?
entry.content:
What Business Catalog is needed to access "maintain storage categories" 103583 ?

 

When trying in CBC im told No Authorization for transaction S_ER3_17000027 of IMG Activity


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to Connect CAPM With Integration Suite ?
entry.content: @gregorw thank you , how generate this edmx file in integration suite.

entry.title: Re: What Business Catalog is needed to access "maintain s...
entry.content: The Business Catalog SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_HDM_CUR_PC needs to be assigned before access to "Maintain Storage Categories"  is possible

entry.title: Re: S/4 Product Compliance - Label Management
entry.content: Also one more question - does this label management solution support integrated checks and automatic triggering for labels as well? Or can the label only be generated manually?

entry.title: Ariba: Unable to receive ASN qty
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have a issue with Ariba Guided buying ASN.

Steps:

1.I create a PR to PO in Guided buying.Qty 10.

2.OC is fully done for qty-10.From supplier end.

3.ASN is partially done.Qty - 5.From supplier end.

Now in the " To receive" tab it is not allowing me to enter qty,I get a error message.(screenshot)

What is the reason and how do we overcome.Is it by standard design?

Thanks.

entry.title: Mass Geocoding program not updating Geocoordinates for T Zones
entry.content:
Hello , we are on S/4 HANA On premise

Iam using the following program to update Coordinates for T zones. Iam giving only location type =1005 .But it is not updating. Can't this mass Geocoding  program be used for updating T zones with co-ordinates ?

secondly we have actual locations address from location master passed to PC miler and getting back geo-coordinates and updated i location master .Cant we pass T zones address to PC miler to get back geo-co-ordinates and update in T Zones ?

 

rgds

sachin

entry.title: Re: XSLT code to delete node based on one field in the it...
entry.content:
Thanks, it works now.

 

<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
<xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes"/>
<xsl:template match="item[TRANSTYPECODE = '']"/>
<xsl:template match="@* | node()">
<xsl:copy>
<xsl:apply-templates select="@* | node()"/>
</xsl:copy>
</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

entry.title: Re: Operation Overlapping in Production order- PP
entry.content: Hi Caetano, Thanks for your response. You mean 2nd operation should have long enough time to overlap?

entry.title: Formatted Search Help
entry.content:
Hi,
I am having a problem with a formatted search in SAP B1 Hana

Table OPOR, I have a UDF    TRX_Expired
Table POR1, I have a UDF     TRX_Expired
I need a formatted search in OPOR to populate TRX_Expired with "Item Expired" if any lines in POR1 TRX_Expired = "Item Expired"

Example 1
     OPOR
     DocNum       TRX_Expired
     1234             Item Expired  (1 item in POR1 has the wording Item Expired)
     POR1
     DocNum        Item Code   TRX_Expired
     1234              ABC1            (Empty)
     1234              ABC2            Item Expired

Example 2
     OPOR
     DocNum       TRX_Expired
     1234             (empty)
     POR1
     DocNum        Item Code   TRX_Expired
     1234              ABC1           (Empty)
     1234              ABC2           (Empty)

It seems straight forward, but I am getting weird errors
Any help will be appreciated.

entry.title: Send emails dynamically in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Good afternoon!

Currently I am working on sending emails to multiple recipients using an XML payload defined as follows:

<EmpRecords>
     <EmpRecord>
           <EmpId>123</EmpId>
           <EmpFName>Gopi</EmpFName>
           <EmpLName>K</EmpLName>
           <EmpCountry>IN</EmpCountry>
           <EmpSalary>30000 </EmpSalary>
           <email>test1@mail.com</email>
     </EmpRecord>
     <EmpRecord>
           <EmpId>456</EmpId>
           <EmpFName>Ram</EmpFName>
           <EmpLName>C</EmpLName>
           <EmpCountry>IN</EmpCountry>
           <EmpSalary>30000</EmpSalary>
           <email> test2@mail.com </email>
     </EmpRecord>
     <EmpRecord>
           <EmpId>789</EmpId>
           <EmpFName>Mohammad</EmpFName>
           <EmpLName>Khan</EmpLName>
           <EmpCountry>IN</EmpCountry>
           <EmpSalary>40000</EmpSalary>
           <email> test3@mail.com </email>
     </EmpRecord>
      <EmpRecord>
           <EmpId>234</EmpId>
           <EmpFName>Varnikai</EmpFName>
           <EmpLName>L</EmpLName>
           <EmpCountry>IN</EmpCountry>
            <EmpSalary>40000</EmpSalary>
           <email> test4@mail.com </email>
     </EmpRecord>
</EmpRecords>

The test emails are:

test1@mail.com

test2@mail.com

test3@mail.com

test4@mail.com

However, I have not found a way to put the 4 emails coming from the payload into the email connector definition.

 

Is there a method to dynamically place emails that come from an XML Payload?

Thanks

Regards

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Login in a S/4 Cloud Public Edition in a unattended process automation
entry.content:
Hi guys,

I have found a action called UI5 Login to login in S/4 system.

Thanks.

entry.title: Maintenance Item is not calling under single cycle plan SAP ECC
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I'm trying to manually call a maintenance item that is part of a single cycle plan.

I have under this plan:

1 MON

2 MON

6 MON

12 MON

The 6 MON maintenance item is not generating out when using IP30. All other plans will generate.

Can you please assist me in figuring out how to schedule the 6 MON maintenance item from the plan?

entry.title: Proposal for Product XXXX Plant XXXX MRP Area XXXX can't be adopted in Manage buffer level app
entry.content:
Hi All,

Got a issue in Manage buffer level app. What could be the cause. Please suggest.

Also Would like to share another solution for a issue.
I have maintained the job template SAP_PPDD_PRODBUFF_MASSACTION_J via SIMG - ABAP Platform - Application Server - System Administration - Activation of Scope-Dependent Application Job Catalog Entries to solve another issue.

entry.title: Add BP Role UKM000 in Customer Migration Template
entry.content: How to add BP Role UKM000 while migrating Customer Master through template?

entry.title: Re: Add BP Role UKM000 in Customer Migration Template
entry.content: This needs to moved Data Migration/Finance Section of Q&A,
